type_definitions.name: ParamDeclaration
type_definitions.description: A single parameter in a method signature, holding a name and its type string

type_definitions.name: MethodDeclaration
type_definitions.description: Structured method signature (L1 resolution) with name, receiver, params, returns, and async flag

type_definitions.name: MemberDeclaration
type_definitions.description: Composite type member: either an enum variant (Variant) or a struct field (Field)

type_definitions.name: VerifyFinding
type_definitions.description: Structured error or warning produced by sotp verify subcommands. Has a Severity (Info/Warning/Error) and a message string.

type_definitions.name: ReviewerFinding
type_definitions.description: Domain-validated reviewer finding. Invariant: message is non-empty. Counterpart to usecase::review_workflow::ReviewFinding (serde DTO).

type_definitions.name: NonEmptyReviewerFindings
type_definitions.description: Non-empty collection of ReviewerFinding values. Used as the inner payload of Verdict::FindingsRemain and FastVerdict::FindingsRemain.

type_definitions.name: ReviewerFindingError
type_definitions.description: Error variants for ReviewerFinding::new constructor validation. Variant EmptyMessage indicates that the reviewer finding message is empty or whitespace-only.
